query:
INSERT INTO hosts (mac, name, disk_size_bytes, ip)
                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
                ON CONFLICT(mac) DO UPDATE SET
                    disk_size_bytes = excluded.disk_size_bytes,
                    ip = excluded.ip
                RETURNING
                    id AS "id!: i64",
                    mac AS "mac!: String",
                    name AS "name!: String",
                    disk_size_bytes AS "disk_size_bytes!: i64",
                    ip AS "ip!: String"
